I spent a while trying to get the hang of the gameplay. but once I did, it was very enjoyable. The price is unbeatable considering most VR games are overprice compared to the actual gameplay. I can't even buy a full meal from taco bell with the money it takes to get this, so I would say it is worth it. When I have trouble killing all those aliens, I just pretend they are little beans that I can munch on one by one. Also, I like the way that you have a massive arena to kill all those beans. I've played this game a few times now, and here's my honest take:

The graphics are solid, and the physics feel pretty good—but the vibes? Absolutely off the charts!

You can play tag with your friends, wield blasters and swords, battle enemies, and even take on full-blown Avengers-style missions—like saving a sinking ship and rescuing passengers on board. It’s wild!

This game is fun to play solo, but it's an absolute blast in multiplayer with friends. Definitely worth checking out! 5 stars!
For ten bucks it’s pretty darn fun! I can’t wait to play with more people! Fun and challenging game by yourself.
It is super fun on the mission and in tag and even more fun with your friends great job to the developers.
The game is challenging and fun!  Fun with friends and by yourself!  Can’t wait to see what else they come up with!
I was surprised on how small the game was in storage. Very hard but fun
